title: Duties of law enforcement officers
doc_html:
§2531.8.  Duties of law enforcement officers

It shall be the duty of all law enforcement officers of this state to enforce the provisions of this Part.

Acts 1998, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 148, §3.
doc_text:
§2531.8.  Duties of law enforcement officers
It shall be the duty of all law enforcement officers of this state to enforce the provisions of this Part.
Acts 1998, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 148, §3.
